name: Margrets Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs. dry black beans, soaked 8 hours/overnight
enough soaking water to cover an inch
1 lemon, quartered with 4 whole cloves stuck in each quarter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry black beans, vegetable stock, and soaking water that will cover an inch of the beans.
2. Add bay leaves to the mixture.
3. Place the pot on the stove and bring it to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cook for 1.5 hours until the beans are tender.
5. Add chopped bell peppers, onions, garlic cloves, cooking sherry, allspice, lemon quarters with whole cloves, and black pepper to the pot.
6. Continue simmering for an additional 0.5-1 hour until everything is well-cooked and tender.
